title: Chapter 20 - Backend VS Frontend
description: Basic questions about backend and frontend concepts.

questions.prompt: Which of the following is a frontend technology?

options.label: An API (System for communication between website and server)
A server (computer that hosts a website)
Edge functions (Server code that runs close to users for fast responses)

explanations.overview: Frontend technologies run in the user's browser and control what they see and interact with. Backend technologies run on servers and handle data, logic, and communication.

byOptionId.css: Correct — CSS is a frontend technology used for styling web pages.
byOptionId.edge-functions: Incorrect — Edge functions are a backend technology that runs close to users for fast responses.
byOptionId.api: Incorrect — An API is a backend technology that allows communication between the frontend and backend.
byOptionId.server: Incorrect — A server is a backend technology that hosts websites and handles requests.
